title: calea purpurea
intro: Calea purpurea, also known as purple false daisy, is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and anxiolytic effects. The health benefits of Calea purpurea include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia and restlessness. Calea purpurea is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and can also be used in aromatherapy to promote a sense of calm and well-being.
